            'Proxy-Authorization': 'leakme',

from cryptography.hazmat.primitives import serialization, hashes
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.asymmetric import ec
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.serialization.pkcs12 import serialize_key_and_certificates

def handler():
    key = ec.generate_private_key(ec.SECP256R1())
    cert = _load_ca_cert()  # Simulated cert with non-matching public key
    encryption = serialization.PrivateFormat.PKCS12.encryption_builder().hmac_hash(hashes.SHA256()).build(b'password')
    serialize_key_and_certificates(b'name', key, cert, [], encryption)
perCve.safeFixture:
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives import serialization, hashes
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.asymmetric import ec
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.serialization.pkcs12 import serialize_key_and_certificates

def handler():
    key = ec.generate_private_key(ec.SECP256R1())
    cert = key.public_key().public_bytes(encoding=serialization.Encoding.DER, format=serialization.PublicFormat.SubjectPublicKeyInfo)
    # Use default encryption without hmac_hash override
    encryption = serialization.NoEncryption()
    serialize_key_and_certificates(b'name', key, cert, [], encryption)

perCve.vulnerableFixture:
class ApplicationController < ActionController::Base
  around_action :wrap_request

  def wrap_request
    ActionDispatch::Executor.wrap do
      yield
    end
  end

  def index
    render plain: 'Hello World'
  end
end
perCve.safeFixture:
class ApplicationController < ActionController::Base
  around_action :wrap_request

  def wrap_request
    ActionDispatch::Executor.wrap do
      yield
    ensure
      ActionDispatch::Executor.reset!
    end
  end

  def index
    render plain: 'Hello World'
  end
end

perCve.safeFixture:
require 'sidekiq/web'

def call(env)
  @env = env
  params = Rack::Utils.parse_query(@env['QUERY_STRING'])
  days = (params['days'] || 30).to_i
  days = 180 if days > 180
  days = 1 if days < 1
  stats_history = Sidekiq::Stats::History.new(days)
  @processed_history = stats_history.processed
  'OK'
end
